reviews.text: Josh is the BEST and is so fun to work with! Josh puts you right at ease! He's great at posing so there's no need to feel like you have to have that mastered before your photos. My husband and I worked with Josh for our engagement shoot/wedding day and have zero regrets. Our guests raved about him too. We definitely recommend him and plan on reaching out to him for any of our photography needs in the future!

Josh is an absolutely incredible photographer. My now husband and I hired him to do our engagement, rehearsal dinner, and wedding photos and both the experience and photos that resulted were an absolute dream.

I usually feel pretty awkward having my photos taken and he not only made us, but also our guests, feel incredible in front of a camera (several of my friends commented on it to me the night of our wedding stating how awesome he was).

I was also really nervous about going with a him as a single shooter, but he seemed to be everywhere and nowhere the day of. He caught all of the most incredible moments from just the right angles, but I never once noticed him moving around the crowd.

I’ve already recommended him to several of my friends, and would highly recommend him to anyone looking for an amazing wedding photographer. Truly can’t sing his praises enough.

Working with Rogue Film Co. for our wedding was nothing short of incredible, and all credit goes to Joshua, our photographer. From start to finish, he captured not just the moments, but the feeling of the day. Every shot looks like it came out of a magazine, yet somehow still feels authentic to who we are.

What stood out most was how easy and natural everything felt. Joshua didn’t just show up with a camera; he became part of the moment. He made everyone comfortable, read the room perfectly, and brought out the best in us without forcing anything. You can tell he genuinely cares about the people he shoots and takes pride in his craft.

When we look at the photos, it’s more than just seeing our wedding; it’s reliving it. Every laugh, every tear, every little detail feels alive again. We couldn’t have asked for a better experience or a more talented, grounded, and genuine photographer to capture such an important day.

Highly recommend Rogue Film Co., and if you are working with Joshua, consider yourself lucky; he’s the real deal.

1000% recommend! We had such a wonderful experience with Joshua, he gave me so much confidence from the beginning. We had not had the most promising experience with a previous photographer, so I definitely had some high expectations when looking for another photographer. Joshua instantly put me at ease and gave me confidence that I had made the right decision. Our first chat was very exciting as we got to know each other and he truly wowed me with his expertise and passion for what he does. Weddings and engagements seem to be the only things he focuses on which is something that one should look for when choosing a wedding photographer, I have learned. He was so fun to talk to and plan with and helped me with a timeline which was really helpful since I did not have a coordinator and he could explain what he traditionally sees and fit it with your wants and needs. Everyone at the wedding loved him and he helped us feel super comfortable in front of the camera and gave us stunning works of art to cherish for the rest of our lives! THANK YOU! So happy!

Joshua is amazing! From start to finish, and even now after the wedding he has been thoughtful, helpful and so fun to work with! Before the wedding he helped me pick the time of the wedding for the best pictures! On the day of the wedding he showed up on time and scouted the area for the best places and lighting for pictures! He was easy to work with, listened to me when I asked for pictures with certain groups of people and made me feel like a princess! Even my husband, who is not the first person to ever connect with people, thoroughly enjoyed Joshua's style and personality! The pictures are far more than I could have ever asked for as well!
